allow: PowerShell(Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; Get-ChildItem "D:\\project\\jualan" -Depth 4 | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer -and $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.next' } | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "D:\\project\\jualan"; & node "node_modules\\next\\dist\\bin\\next" dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; Receive-Job $job -Keep | Select-Object -Last 15)
